name: IS 800:2007 — General Construction in Steel (Limit-State)
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check structural-steel BOQ items and design documents against IS 800:2007 (limit-state design basis) — section designation (ISMB/ISMC/ISA etc.), steel grade (E250/E350/E410), connection type, weld specification (IS 816), bolt grade (IS 1367), corrosion-protection, fire-protection rating, and consistency with IS 1893 seismic basis and IS 875 loads.
description_hi: इस्पात बीओक्यू मदों एवं डिज़ाइन दस्तावेज़ों की आईएस 800:2007 (सीमा-स्थिति) के अनुसार जाँच।
